description.value: Price 32,870 gp; Slot none; CL 11th; Weight 3 lbs.; Aura moderate conjuration [evil] DESCRIPTION This wide machete is darkly stained with blood. It is treated as a +1 keen short sword that also has a vicious cutting edge, allowing it to deal slashing damage in addition to piercing damage. The murdererâs machete grants its wielder the ability to move with unnatural grace and speed while stalking potential victims. The wielder gains a +2 competence bonus on Stealth checks and Survival checks to track. In addition, once per day, the wielder can lick the bloodstains on the blade as a standard action to gain the benefits of cruel jaunt. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 16,590 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells cruel jaunt, keen edge; Special creator must sacrifice a sentient living creature
